content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Killer
description: Legendary Hyperion class mod for Zer0 the Assassin. Built around Headsh0t, Killer, Vel0city, Ambush, Tw0Fang. Boosts critical hit performance and action skill cooldown.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC.

special.description: At max level: +51% critical hit damage, +57.5% action skill cooldown rate.
special.title: Well, that escalated quickly.
